recipes.title: Suppress cosmetic shell commands (git status / log / diff)

body.reason: Cosmetic shell commands (git status, ls, pwd) generate noise without security risk

recipes.why: Tool suppressions let you silence findings on tools whose name matches a regex. Use this to drop noisy verdicts on read-only commands while keeping write/destructive commands surfaced.
